subject: Refinement in MCore - Choosing parameters
body:
Hi, 

I am currently wanting trying to refine in M with particles that went to 8A 
in relion. 

I was just wondering if there were any guidelines on refinement in M and 
what parameters to use/try and if there is a particular order? I wasnt 
certain that the parameters in the tutorial were good for every case. 

Thank you for any help you can provide to get started!!

Paris
